name: vibe-sentinel
description: Sentinel for vibe-coding: enforce assumption verification and change-control scope before implementation.

interface.shortDescription: Sentinel for vibe-coding: assumption gate plus change-control contract before implementation.
interface.longDescription: Vibe Sentinel combines two cross-agent guardrails into one plugin. The assumption-killer skill makes agents identify, classify, and verify assumptions with repository evidence before editing code. The change-control-compiler skill compiles vague requests into enforceable contracts with scope, allowed/forbidden areas, verification commands, risk, stop conditions, and drift detection. One vibe-sentinel orchestrator routes implementation tasks through both gates and runs the validators before the final response.
defaultPrompt: Run the vibe-sentinel guardrail workflow before implementation.
Initialize the assumption gate and change-control contract artifacts.
Verify high-risk assumptions with repository evidence.
Validate scope, run the final check, and run drift before the final response.
